title: primula roylei subsp. dianae
intro: Primula roylei subsp. dianae, also known as Himalayan or Himalayan meadow primrose, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The health benefits of Primula roylei subsp. dianae include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and calm digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with the leaves and flowers being used to make a medicinal drink that can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
